name: ☘️春季野菇白腰豆濃湯 Spring Mushroom and White Bean soup
desc:
以綜合季節菇類與白腰豆拌炒燉煮而成，加入柑橘鮮奶油與新鮮百里香，搭配烤奶油佛卡夏享用。【本餐點另含蔥、蒜、黑胡椒及其製品】
Sautéed mixed seasonal mushroom and white beans, in rich mushroom broth, tangerine cream and fresh thyme. Served with toasted butter fuccacia.
